subject: Kubfu, a small bear-like fighting-type Pokemon in a combat stance
description: A small bear-like creature with grey-white fur stands upright in a fighting stance, fists raised. It has a tuft of white hair on its head and a stern, determined expression with narrowed eyes. Chunks of rubble and debris are scattered around it, suggesting a forceful impact or training strike. The background is warm gold and orange with sweeping diagonal lines, giving the impression of speed and kinetic energy. The figure is compact but powerful in posture.
foreground: Kubfu standing upright in fighting stance, debris around it
background: warm gold and orange with diagonal motion lines
